nameMeanings.name: Malherbe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, French, Huguenot: locative name from the canton of Malesherbes (Loiret) in France.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe was born about 1120 as the daughter of John de Malherbe and Matilda Fitzswain. She had at least 15 sons with Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh. She died in 1178, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe est née environ 1120, fille de John de Malherbe et Matilda Fitzswain. Elle a eu au moins 15 fils avec Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh. Elle est décédée en 1178, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe wurde um 1120, als Tochter von John de Malherbe und Matilda Fitzswain geboren. Sie hatte mit Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh mindestens 15 Söhne. Sie starb 1178 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe è nata il circa 1120 come figlia di John de Malherbe e Matilda Fitzswain. Lei avuto almeno 15 figli con Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh. Morì nel 1178, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbeは約1120年にJohn de MalherbeとMatilda Fitzswainの娘として生まれた。彼女はGalfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburghとの間に少なくとも15人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1178年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe(은)는 대략 1120년 John de Malherbe(와)과 Matilda Fitzswain의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe nasceu aproximadamente 1120 filha de John de Malherbe e Matilda Fitzswain. Ela teve pelo menos 15 filhos com Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh. Ela faleceu em 1178, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe родилась около 1120 г. Её родителей звали John de Malherbe и Matilda Fitzswain. У неё было по крайней мере 15 сыновей от Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh. Она умерла в 1178 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Matilda Malherbe nació aproximadamente 1120 como hija de John de Malherbe y Matilda Fitzswain. Tuvo por lo menos 15 hijos con Galfridus de Melville Sheriff of Edinburgh. Murió en 1178, a la edad de 59 años.
